'''Garu Hral Eschen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Drovian]]. He was killed, along with his whole family by [[Gopso'o]] warriors. Though his manner of [[Death/Legends|death]] is unknown, he was apparently disemboweled. His descendant [[Knezex Hral Piksoar]] would later work for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}
